repos.name: cbapp
repos.description: The cbapp repository appears to be a Python-based project that has undergone significant updates and refactoring, including domain migrations, API additions, and feature enhancements. Recent commits have focused on improving the user interface, adding new features such as Typeform integration, and fixing bugs. The repository is now in a state of active development.

repos.name: RCI-Frontend
repos.description: Internal tool for managing political radio advertising rates across 1,900+ radio stations with advanced filtering, QA workflows, and rate management capabilities · Built with Manus

repos.name: cbfiles
repos.description: The cbfiles repository appears to be a Python project that provides various features for image and video processing, including vision inference, search, and media asset management. Recent commits have focused on improving performance, adding new features such as HEIC support, and enhancing compatibility with different platforms. The repository has also undergone domain migrations and refactorings.

repos.name: cbproject
repos.description: cbproject repository with ongoing development and maintenance

repos.name: cbos
repos.description: The cbos repository appears to be a Python project that has undergone significant development and maintenance over several months, with recent commits focusing on improving code quality, adding new features, and updating dependencies. The repository has seen multiple major releases (v0.3.1, v0.4.0, v0.5.0) and several minor updates, indicating a steady pace of development and refinement. Overall, the project seems to be centered around building a mesh-based system with various features and tools.

Recent changes have focused on improving the user experience, security, and functionality of the application.

repos.name: cbloom
repos.description: Cbloom is a TypeScript-based campaign content and narrative engine focusing on responsive tile layouts and data integration. Recent commits highlight improvements to the core loom functionality, including enhanced responsive grid design, new loom types, data access, and API development. The repository emphasizes a focus on building a robust and flexible campaign content pipeline.

repos.name: automation-spotlight
repos.description: The `automation-spotlight` repository is a monthly internal newsletter focused on automating tasks with CSS. Recent commits include new features for building, managing, and displaying automation workflows, including templates, stylesheets, and content. Key milestones identified are the addition of the HR document automation and the scaffolding of the project structure.

repos.name: cbingest
repos.description: This GitHub repository, developed by cbingest, is a data ingestion pipeline service focused on automating the extraction of text from Claude JSON responses. Recent commits highlight improvements in extraction, data persistence, UI enhancements, and documentation. Key milestones include implementing full document extraction, adding documentation, and establishing a maintenance pass for the API.

repos.name: mission-control
repos.description: CJ's personal operating layer - morning briefing, decision queue, priority intelligence

repos.name: cbskills
repos.description: The cbskills repository is a centralized resource for managing Claude skills, particularly focusing on supply chain security and incorporating new features like the Cowork/Claude Desktop install and Mission Control v1. It’s a rapidly evolving project with recent commits addressing security, plugin development, and marketplace enhancements.
